content.text:
rbenv exec bundle exec rails runner '
  require "yaml"
  blueprint_dir = ".rhino/blueprints"
  model_names = Dir.glob("#{blueprint_dir}/*.yaml")
    .reject { |p| File.basename(p) == "_roles.yaml" }
    .map { |p| YAML.load_file(p)["model"] }
    .compact

  fails = []
  fails << "base_owner is not Organization" unless Organization.base_owner? resc ue nil
  fails << "invitation_token column missing" unless User.column_names.include?(" invitation_token") rescue nil
  [Organization, UserRole, Role].each { |m| begin; m.count; rescue StandardError ; fails << "#{m}.count failed"; end }
  model_names.each do |name|
    next unless Object.const_defined?(name)
    k = Object.const_get(name)
    fails << "#{name}.resource_owned_by is nil — rhino_owner missing or commente d" if k.resource_owned_by.nil? rescue nil
    begin; k.owner_class; rescue StandardError; fails << "#{name}.owner_class cr ashes — rhino_owner reflection broken"; end
  end
  fails.each { |f| puts "FAIL: #{f}" }
  exit(fails.empty? ? 0 : 1)
'

observation.command:
rbenv exec bundle exec rails runner '
  require "yaml"
  blueprint_dir = ".rhino/blueprints"
  model_names = Dir.glob("#{blueprint_dir}/*.yaml")
    .reject { |p| File.basename(p) == "_roles.yaml" }
    .map { |p| YAML.load_file(p)["model"] }
    .compact

  fails = []
  fails << "base_owner is not Organization" unless Organization.base_owner? rescue nil
  fails << "invitation_token column missing" unless User.column_names.include?("invitation_token") rescue nil
  [Organization, UserRole, Role].each { |m| begin; m.count; rescue StandardError; fails << "#{m}.count failed"; end }
  model_names.each do |name|
    next unless Object.const_defined?(name)
    k = Object.const_get(name)
    fails << "#{name}.resource_owned_by is nil — rhino_owner missing or commented" if k.resource_owned_by.nil? rescue nil
    begin; k.owner_class; rescue StandardError; fails << "#{name}.owner_class crashes — rhino_owner reflection broken"; end
  end
  fails.each { |f| puts "FAIL: #{f}" }
  exit(fails.empty? ? 0 : 1)
'
